mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RESULTINFO WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND play_date = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RESULTINFO WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND play_date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RESULTINFO ( member_id, play_date, game_count, input_num, result, hidden_num ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{playDate}, #{gameCount}, #{inputNum}, #{result}, #{hiddenNum} )
